string.text: Destroy the Enemies of Greh
You need to suppress the territorial threat in this zone.
I have an important mission for you, brother. You must destroy the camp of the heretics so that our brothers can establish themselves better in this place. Are you ready?
Task completed? Good. Greh appreciates good work.
Kill the Heretic
A stalker wants to attack us. Kill him.
A stalker wants to attack us. Find and kill this heretic.
You did well. The brothers are proud of you.
Find Weapon: %s
Veles is looking for new weapons.
We are growing stronger every day. We need more weapons to achieve our goals. You must find new weapons for us.
%s is what we currently lack. Bring it when you find it.
That's good. The brothers are proud of you.
Meat
Hunt %s. Give the meat to Veles - he can cook it.
Our supplies are running low. You need to go into the Zone and hunt.
Here, %s is what we need. Remember, these creatures are a gift from the Zone. Kill them swiftly and with gratitude.
You have succeeded. Well done.
Find %s
Find %s. Return to Veles.
You must provide more supplies for us so we can continue our great work.
The search target is %s. Retrieve it and return.
Greh appreciates good work.
Find the Artefact %s
Find the artefact %s and bring it to Veles so he can prepare it as a sacrifice.
We need an artefact to offer as a sacrifice. Are you ready to serve Greh and find it?
Here, %s is what we need. Bring it to me so we can conduct the ceremony.
You serve Greh well. Join us today in the ceremonial hall. There will be singing.
Destroy the Mutant Lair
A cluster of mutants has been detected in this area, posing a threat to our brothers. Clean the area and return to Svarog for your reward.
Don’t you enjoy hunting? Recently, mutants made a lair near a vital spot for us, and it would be great if someone could shoot them. Will you take care of it?
Excellent! Here’s your money. It’ll be a little calmer now, thank you, brother.
Destroy the Bandit Camp
The area needs to be cleared of bandits.
We have big problems with bandits in this area. Can you help?
Hell yeah, thank you! They won’t bother us for a long time now! Here’s your reward.
Hunt for Meat
Svarog asked for %s to feed the brothers.
If you're a good shot and aren't afraid of mutants, I have a job for you. Interested?

Food supplies are running low, and I need something to feed the brothers. Someone brings me a mutant carcass every now and then, but recently no one wants to hunt. So, if you're not busy, bring me %s. Remember, adrenaline from the animal’s excitement makes the meat tough, and the less blood during the kill, the tastier the meat. So, shoot carefully, okay?
Excellent, you're quite the hunter! Here’s your reward:
Find %s for Odin
Bring tools to Odin so he can upgrade equipment.

You know, brother, I'm actually quite the technician. I can repair weapons and armor, even do some upgrades! Well, I would, if I had decent tools. But where would I get them around here? Can you help me get a basic toolkit?
I need a toolkit for heavy-duty work. It should include tools and oils for weapon maintenance. If you can get it, I’ll be grateful, and I’ll even pay you... Probably.
Excellent, man! Oh, sorry, I don't have money to pay you. But I can give you a nice discount!
Find %s for Odin
Bring Odin tools for precision work. He needs a more complete set to perform more complex upgrades on equipment.
Hey, man, if you agree to get me a more complete set, you’ll get an even bigger discount. Will you help, buddy?
I need tools for precision work. It should have everything I need. You’ll be like a brother if you can get them!

Wow, thanks, buddy! Now I’m really gonna get rich. Damn, I’m going to be successful... Unless, of course, I mess this up too. But for now, I can’t offer you anything better than a discount. Sorry, buddy.
Find %s for Odin
Bring Odin %s. He needs a unique set to perform even more complex upgrades on equipment.
Hey, buddy, if you find something worth it - I’ll give you a discount!
I need calibration tools. It should have everything I need. You’ll be like a brother if you get them!

Holy...! Damn, thanks, buddy! Now I’m definitely going to get rich. Damn, I’m going to be successful... Unless, of course, I mess this up too. But for now, I can’t offer you anything better than a discount. Sorry, dude.
%s for Yarovit
You need to find the kit and bring it to the medic Yarovit.
I need a good medical kit. I can patch up light wounds quickly, but for anything more serious than a simple scalpel, I’m lacking the right tools.
I need a good medical kit. I can patch up light wounds quickly, but for anything more serious than a simple scalpel, I’m lacking the right tools.
Thanks, my friend! These tools will save the lives of many brothers. Thanks again for the tools.
